label: post_mechanical (CodeExample-expanded + Sphinx API + heading-aware chunking; gold remapped)
note: vs baseline_frozen: coverage@5 0.18->0.20 (flat) => corpus/chunking was NOT the coverage bottleneck (it WAS poisoning gold/recall). exact-recall vs remapped gold 0.67->0.54 (recall no longer inflated by stub gold). Bottleneck localized to retrieval/measurement -> Phase 2 triage.
